description: Canonical editable multi-symbol Money Flow evidence campaign for the January 2026 archival/vendor-data-required plan. Uses persisted candles only and is intended for manual founder/operator research review; it is not the public Hyperliquid first-evidence baseline because January 2026 15m candles were not available from public candleSnapshot in the 2026-05-05 research pass.
window_convention: (start_at, end_at] candle closes; closes exactly at start are excluded and closes on or before end are included.

windows.label: core_window_1
windows.description: Editable canonical starter window. Interpreted as candle closes in (start_at, end_at].

windows.label: core_window_2
windows.description: Adjacent editable starter window; the Jan 15 boundary close is not double-counted.
